title: Creamy Tangy Egyptian Yogurt Sandwich
description: A quick, nutfree Egyptian sandwich featuring tangy yogurt, fresh vegetables, and warm pita rolls, perfect for a light lunch or snack.

ingredients.name: Egyptian whole wheat pita rolls
ingredients.notes: choose soft, fresh rolls for best texture

ingredients.name: Cucumber, diced
ingredients.notes: blanch 30 s in boiling water, then ice‑bath

instructions: Whisk the yogurt, lemon juice, minced garlic, dill, cumin, salt, and pepper in a bowl until well blended.
Fold in the diced tomato and blanched cucumber, mixing gently to combine; cover and chill for 10 min.
Warm the pita rolls on a skillet over medium heat or in a toaster oven until soft, about 2–3 min per side.
Slice each roll horizontally to create two halves.
Spread a generous layer of the yogurt mixture onto the bottom half of each roll.
Top with the other half and press lightly to hold the filling.
Drizzle a few drops of olive oil over the sandwich, sprinkle extra dill if desired, and serve immediately.
